/usr/bin/ar qc libaws-c-event-stream.a "CMakeFiles/aws-c-event-stream.dir/source/event_stream.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-event-stream.dir/source/event_stream_channel_handler.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-event-stream.dir/source/event_stream_rpc.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-event-stream.dir/source/event_stream_rpc_client.c.o" "CMakeFiles/aws-c-event-stream.dir/source/event_stream_rpc_server.c.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libaws-c-event-stream.a
